{"id":"project-LICHEN-906e","title":"Remove deprecated RX_POLL from protocol and servers","description":"Delete polling code after ALL callers converted: (1) sim_client.py uses MSG_RX_OK/decode_rx_ok, (2) node_server.py uses MSG_RX/encode_rx_ok. Cannot remove from protocol.py until these are converted. Premature removal reverted.","acceptance_criteria":"No RX_POLL references remain; 2-node test still passes with push-based RX","notes":"2026-07-11: Verified still blocked. node_server.py is actively used by server.py and 10+ test files (test_server.py, test_integration.py, test_multinode.py, etc.). Polling functions (decode_rx, encode_rx_ok, encode_rx_timeout) in protocol.py cannot be removed until project-LICHEN-4t5u (Deprecate node_server.py) is completed.
Analysis: sim_client.py is FULLY converted to push-based RX (uses encode_rx_enter, MSG_RX_PACKET, MSG_RX_TIMEOUT_PUSH only). No poll-based imports remain.

Dependency chain:
- sim_client.py (push-based) -> node_server.py (supports both) -> server.py
- server.py imports start_node_server from node_server.py
- 12 test files reference NodeServer: test_node_server.py, test_server.py, test_integration.py, test_multinode.py, test_dtn_sim.py, test_gpsr_sim.py, test_backpressure_sim.py, test_topology_change.py, test_topology_scenarios.py, test_renode_integration.py, test_renode_server.py, test_opportunistic_sim.py

Poll-based functions to remove from protocol.py:
- MSG_RX (0x20), MSG_RX_OK (0x21), MSG_RX_TIMEOUT (0x22)
- encode_rx(), decode_rx()
- encode_rx_ok(), decode_rx_ok()
- encode_rx_timeout()

Push-based functions to KEEP:
- MSG_RX_ENTER (0x24), MSG_RX_EXIT (0x26), MSG_RX_PACKET (0x27), MSG_RX_TIMEOUT_PUSH (0x28)
- encode_rx_enter(), decode_rx_enter(), encode_rx_exit()
- encode_rx_packet(), decode_rx_packet()
- encode_rx_timeout_push()

node_server.py uses poll-based at lines 363 (decode_rx), 391 (encode_rx_ok), 394 (encode_rx_timeout). test_protocol.py has ~20 test lines exercising poll-based functions.

Migration path:
1. [BLOCKED] Wait for project-LICHEN-4t5u (Deprecate node_server.py) to complete
2. Remove poll-based constants and functions from protocol.py
3. Remove poll-based tests from test_protocol.py (lines 360-473 approx)
4. Verify 2-node test passes with push-based RX

renode_server.py is already pure push-based (no poll imports), so the replacement path is clear.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"grinder","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-10T18:01:38.2542Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T05:15:40.402706Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-906e","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-uxt6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-10T18:01:38.255335Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-906e","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-hit3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-10T18:01:38.256375Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-906e","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-iw00","type":"related","created_at":"2026-07-10T22:19:23.447918Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-906e","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-dpdn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-10T22:19:52.707348Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-906e","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-4t5u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-10T22:19:53.035467Z"}]}
